notes: FROZEN (agent=no / daemon=incapable): antigravity authenticates via Google OAuth and exposes no plan/subscription identifier (no rate_limits, no PlanType, no Credits) in the transcript or any hook payload, and the daemon has no RateLimitSnapshot ingestion path for antigravity. RateLimitSnapshot can never be non-nil. Unblock: a plan-tier signal from agy AND a daemon channel to ingest it.
